name: TCEL T9-036-Simulation-Laboratory

rules.name: Cross-tenant denial
rules.reasonTemplate: SL-013: access denied - cross-tenant access is prohibited (Security).

rules.name: AI execution prohibition
rules.reasonTemplate: SL-017: denied - an AI agent may not take material actions; agents are advisory-only (AI Governance).

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-036-Simulation-Laboratory Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: SL-013/SL-017 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: SL-001 Simulation isolation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Simulation isolation | Critical | Architecture. SL-002 Synthetic data | Governance | Require documented compliance: Synthetic data | Critical | Architecture. SL-003 Historical replay | Governance | Require documented compliance: Historical replay | Critical | Architecture. SL-004 Scenario approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Scenario approval | Critical | Architecture. SL-005 Model versioning | Governance | Require documented compliance: Model versioning | Critical | Architecture. SL-006 Experiment owner | Governance | Require documented compliance: Experiment owner | Critical | Architecture. SL-007 Hypothesis | Governance | Require documented compliance: Hypothesis | Critical | Architecture. SL-008 Control group | Governance | Require documented compliance: Control group | Critical | Architecture. SL-009 Production separation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Production separation | Critical | Architecture. SL-010 Result labeling | Governance | Require documented compliance: Result labeling | Critical | Architecture. SL-011 Reproducibility | Governance | Require documented compliance: Reproducibility | Critical | Architecture. SL-012 Data privacy | Governance | Require documented compliance: Data privacy | Critical | Architecture. SL-013 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | Critical | Security. SL-014 Resource limits | Governance | Require documented compliance: Resource limits | Critical | Architecture. SL-015 Model comparison | Governance | Require documented compliance: Model comparison | Critical | Architecture. SL-016 Outcome tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Outcome tracking | High | Architecture. SL-017 AI execution prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI execution prohibition | High | AI Governance. SL-018 Rollback | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Architecture. SL-019 Snapshot integrity | Governance | Require documented compliance: Snapshot integrity | High | Architecture. SL-020 Experiment approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Experiment approval | High | Architecture. SL-021 Ethical review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Ethical review | High | Architecture. SL-022 Security review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Security review | High | Architecture. SL-023 Evidence retention | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Evidence retention | High | Architecture. SL-024 Failure handling | Governance | Require documented compliance: Failure handling | High | Architecture. SL-025 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Architecture.
